tos.acceptanceText: By accessing or using Yardees, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our platform. These terms apply to all users, including buyers, sellers, and visitors.
tos.eligibilityText: You must be at least 18 years old to use Yardees. By creating an account, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years of age and have the legal capacity to enter into these terms.
tos.accountsText: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information as necessary. You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
tos.listingsText: You are solely responsible for the content of your listings, including descriptions, photos, and pricing. All listings must be for legal items and must accurately represent the items being sold. Yardees reserves the right to remove any listing that violates these terms or applicable laws.
tos.transactionsText: Yardees is a marketplace platform that facilitates connections between buyers and sellers. We are not a party to any transaction between users. All transactions are conducted directly between buyers and sellers, and users are responsible for fulfilling their obligations in any transaction.
tos.prohibitedText: You may not use Yardees for any illegal purpose, to sell prohibited items (weapons, drugs, stolen goods, counterfeit items), to harass or defraud other users, to post false or misleading content, to spam or send unsolicited communications, or to attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems.
tos.intellectualPropertyText: Yardees and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by Yardees and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. You retain ownership of content you post but grant Yardees a non-exclusive license to use, display, and distribute your content on the platform.
tos.limitationText: Yardees is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the platform's reliability, accuracy, or availability. Yardees shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
tos.terminationText: We may suspend or terminate your account at our discretion if we believe you have violated these terms. You may delete your account at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the platform ceases immediately, though certain provisions of these terms will survive termination.
tos.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or through a notice on our platform. Your continued use of Yardees after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.
tos.contactText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us through the feedback form on our platform or email us at support@yardees.net.

privacy.infoCollectText: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, location, and any content you post on our platform. We also automatically collect certain information when you use Yardees, including your IP address, device type, browser type, and usage patterns.
privacy.howWeUseText: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, send you notifications about your account and listings, communicate with you about our platform, personalize your experience, and ensure the safety and security of our community.
privacy.sharingText: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with other users as necessary for transactions (e.g., sharing your general location with buyers), with service providers who assist us in operating our platform, and when required by law or to protect the rights and safety of our users and platform.
privacy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to maintain your session, remember your preferences (such as language and theme settings), and improve our platform. You can control cookie settings through your browser, though disabling cookies may affect your ability to use certain features.
privacy.dataSecurityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.yourRightsText: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can update your profile information at any time through your dashboard. You may also request a copy of your data or ask us to delete your account by contacting our support team.
privacy.retentionText: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you services. We may retain certain information after account deletion for legal compliance, dispute resolution, and enforcement of our agreements.
privacy.childrenText: Yardees is not intended for use by children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.
privacy.changesText: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "last updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us through the feedback form on our platform or email us at privacy@yardees.com.

collections.title: Seasonal Collections
collections.subtitle: Curated picks for every season and occasion
collections.back-to-school-desc: Everything students need for a great school year — backpacks, books, electronics, and more at thrift prices.
collections.summer-sports-desc: Hit the beach, trail, or court with pre-owned sports equipment and outdoor gear.
collections.holiday-decor-desc: Deck the halls for less! Find festive decorations, gift ideas, and seasonal treasures.
collections.vintage-finds-desc: One-of-a-kind vintage treasures, retro collectibles, and antique gems.
collections.baby-essentials-desc: Gently used baby gear, clothing, and toys — because they grow up so fast!
collections.home-refresh-desc: Transform your space with quality second-hand furniture, decor, and appliances.
collections.tech-deals-desc: Pre-owned electronics, gadgets, and tech accessories at unbeatable prices.
collections.spring-cleaning-desc: Fresh finds from spring cleanouts — furniture, clothing, tools, and hidden gems.
